v1.0.0 Blueprint

Monitoring & Logs

Real-time observability and system health tracking

Observability
Worker Status

Online/Offline/Busy

Current Job

Job type & progress

CPU Usage

0-100% per worker

RAM Usage

MB/GB consumed

Heartbeat

Last seen timestamp

Logs

Realtime stream

Version

Worker version

Uptime

Duration since start

Heartbeat Protocol
// Worker sends every 30 seconds
interface Heartbeat {
  worker_id: string;
  timestamp: ISO8601;
  status: "idle" | "busy" | "error";
  current_job_id: string | null;
  progress: number;  // 0-100
  
  // System metrics
  cpu_percent: number;
  memory_mb: number;
  disk_mb: number;
  
  // Health checks
  supabase_connected: boolean;
  redis_connected: boolean;
  ai_provider_available: boolean;
}

// Orchestrator monitors
if (last_heartbeat > 2_minutes) {
  mark_worker_offline();
  trigger_recovery();
}
Log Structure
interface LogEntry {
  id: uuid;
  worker_id: string;
  project_id: string;
  job_id: string;
  level: "debug" | "info" | "warn" | "error";
  message: string;
  metadata: JSON;
  timestamp: DateTime;
  step_id?: string;
  tool?: string;
  duration_ms?: number;
}

// Realtime subscription
supabase
  .channel("logs")
  .on("INSERT", (payload) => {
    update_dashboard(payload.new);
  })
Health Checks
API Server
Every 10s
Database
Every 10s
Redis
Every 10s
Worker Pool
Every 30s
Stripe API
Every 60s
Alert Conditions

Worker Offline > 2 min

Auto-restart, notify user

Job Failed

Retry, escalate if max retries

API Rate Limited

Backoff, queue for retry

High CPU > 90%

Scale up, notify admin

Disk Full > 85%

Cleanup, expand volume

Payment Failed

Notify user, grace period
